description: Generates AI art and images from text descriptions using advanced image models (Gemini Imagen, SD, etc). Use this for artistic creation.
routing_instructions: [IMAGE_GEN: generate_image:description] - Generate an image from a textual prompt. Only use this if the user explicitly asks to create, draw, or generate an image.

commands.generate_image: Generates an image from a text description. Uses the configured provider.

function.name: IMAGE_GEN__generate_image
function.description: Generates an image from a text description. Uses the configured provider.

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image or photo to generate. Translate to English if needed.
